commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `sanitizeSessionHistory` to strip invalid thinking-signature blocks for Anthropic, Bedrock, and Anthropic Vertex even when `preserveSignatures` is false, and adds four sanitizer regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high-confidence: current main skips `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` whenever `policy.preserveSignatures` is false, so an Anthropic/Bedrock replay history containing an unsigned thinking block can survive sanitization. I did not run a live interrupted Anthropic continuation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real replay proof and maintainer confirmation that replay-side mitigation is sufficient scope for this PR; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(memory): strip invalid thinking signatures for signed-thinking providers
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #84430 — incomplete thinking blocks (missing signature) persisted to session JSONL cause `Invalid signature in thinking block` on next request
- `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` was conditionally gated on `policy.preserveSignatures`, allowing unsigned thinking blocks to reach the Anthropic API on recovery paths where `preserveSignatures` is `false`
- Scoped the unconditional sanitizer to the three providers that require signed thinking: `anthropic`, `amazon-bedrock`, and `anthropic-vertex`. Providers using `anthropic-messages` transport without signed-thinking requirements (Kimi Coding, GitHub Copilot Claude) remain gated by `policy.preserveSignatures`

## Changes

- `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts`: `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` now always runs for Anthropic/Bedrock/Vertex providers regardless of `preserveSignatures`; other providers keep the `policy.preserveSignatures` gate
- `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`: 4 new regression tests covering the `preserveSignatures: false` path for Anthropic, Bedrock, Kimi Coding (anthropic-messages transport), and GitHub Copilot Claude (anthropic-messages transport)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Incomplete thinking blocks (missing/empty/blank signature) survive session replay sanitization when policy.preserveSignatures is false on real Anthropic providers. The fix scopes unconditional `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` to the three signed-thinking providers (anthropic, amazon-bedrock, anthropic-vertex). Providers using anthropic-messages transport without signed-thinking requirements (Kimi, Copilot Claude) are explicitly not affected.

Real environment tested: macOS Darwin 25.4.0 (arm64), Node.js v24.14.1, OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (7c280d7)

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.test.ts \
  src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts \
  src/agents/transcript-policy.test.ts

pnpm format:check src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts \
  src/agents/transcript-policy.ts \
  src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts

pnpm lint src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts \
  src/agents/transcript-policy.ts
```

Evidence after fix:
```
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  130 passed (130)
 Format: all matched files use the correct format
 Lint:   0 warnings and 0 errors
```

New regression tests:
- `strips unsigned thinking blocks for anthropic api even when preserveSignatures is false` — verifies Anthropic always strips unsigned blocks
- `strips unsigned thinking for bedrock-converse-stream even when preserveSignatures is false` — same for Bedrock
- `preserves unsigned thinking blocks for kimi coding with anthropic-messages transport` — verifies Kimi (anthropic-messages transport, non-signed-thinking provider) is NOT affected
- `preserves unsigned thinking blocks for github copilot claude with anthropic-messages transport` — verifies Copilot Claude (anthropic-messages transport, non-signed-thinking provider) is NOT affected

Observed result after fix: 130 tests pass (27 thinking, 62 sanitize-session-history including 4 new, 41 transcript-policy). Format and lint clean. The sanitizer unconditionally protects Anthropic/Bedrock/Vertex replay from poisoned thinking blocks while preserving existing behavior for Kimi, Copilot Claude, and all other non-signed-thinking providers.

What was not tested: Live Anthropic session takeover + continuation (requires live credentials and in-process stream interrupt orchestration); multi-turn session recovery from a JSONL corrupted before this patch (cross-version compat)
